prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: A kernel oops points at a driver path after a device event. Find the C source files in torvalds/linux that (1) register the relevant driver probe or interrupt path, (2) report kernel oops or BUG diagnostics for that subsystem, and (3) unwind or log the fault from the crashing code path.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the linux-kernel fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: A kernel oops points at a driver path after a device event. Find the C source files in torvalds/linux that (1) register the relevant driver probe or interrupt path, (2) report kernel oops or BUG diagnostics for that subsystem, and (3) unwind or log the fault from the crashing code path.

params.search_pattern: oops OR BUG OR driver probe OR interrupt
